title: lanariaceae
intro: The Lanariaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that includes a small number of genera, typically consisting of closely related species that share similar characteristics and traits. The Lanariaceae family is part of the larger plant kingdom and is often defined by distinctive features such as leaf or flower morphology. However, the Lanariaceae family is relatively rare and not widely recognized, with some sources considering it to be an outdated or obsolete classification.
